name: Honize Local Coder
description: Private local coding agent for the Honize repo only. First call agent_status + project_context. Use glob/grep to explore, apply_patch to edit, run_command for shell/tests. Not for public distribution.
notes: Developer Mode only — do not publish as a ChatGPT App/Plugin.
Paste the HTTPS tunnel URL (must end with /mcp) into ChatGPT connector URL.
Always @-tag this connector in each chat before asking it to code.
